task_completion.description: Create a 'Critical' priority work order for Building 1 with code WO-STORM-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint work order list or detail view, there should be a work order with Code 'WO-STORM-001', Priority 'Critical', and a description mentioning 'Roof membrane breach' or 'active water intrusion'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'High' priority work order for Building 2 with code WO-STORM-002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint work order list or detail view, there should be a work order with Code 'WO-STORM-002', Priority 'High', and a description mentioning 'HVAC rooftop unit displacement'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Medium' priority work order for Building 3 with code WO-STORM-003.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint work order list or detail view, there should be a work order with Code 'WO-STORM-003', Priority 'Medium', and a description mentioning 'Parking garage lighting circuit failure'.

task_completion.description: Update the status of work order 'WO-PRE-RESOLVED' to 'Closed' or 'Completed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint work order list or detail view, the work order with Code 'WO-PRE-RESOLVED' must show a status of 'Closed' or 'Completed'.

task_completion.description: Do not modify the work order 'WO-CONTAM-001'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint work order list, the work order with Code 'WO-CONTAM-001' should still be present and its status should not appear as recently closed or modified by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMaint graphical user interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenMaint web interface (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/) being used to create and modify the work orders, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the CMMS system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The work orders should be visible within the OpenMaint application's data grids or forms, not just typed into a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots used to artificially alter the text of the work order list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 3 new corrective maintenance work orders to be created in OpenMaint: WO-STORM-001 (Critical priority), WO-STORM-002 (High priority), and WO-STORM-003 (Medium priority). Exactly 1 pre-existing work order (WO-PRE-RESOLVED) must be closed, and exactly 1 contamination work order (WO-CONTAM-001) must remain unmodified. The system used is OpenMaint, a real CMMS for Commercial Property Management.
